---
title: "`rcontroll` practical work - Day 1"
subtitle: "Hands-on TROLL advanced usage"
author: "Sylvain Schmitt"
institute: CIRAD
date: 2026/04/08
date-format: medium
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: dark
    output-location: fragment
    slide-number: true
    logo: figs/logo.png
    transition: fade
    preview-links: true
    chalkboard: true
bibliography: references.bib
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      .reveal .slide-logo {
        max-height: unset;
        height: 100px;
      }
      </style>
---

## Menu

```{r}
#| echo: false
knitr::include_graphics("figs/troll_model_cheatsheet.svg")
```

# Introduction

<!-- In reality a lot to do before simulations and experiments -->

# Prepare Species

# Prepare Climate

# Prepare Soil

# LIDAR simulation

# Model evaluation

# Sensitivity analysis

# Calibration analysis

# Schmitt et al. 2020

# References
